rationale: Independent audit 2026-07-14: auto-quarantine + orphan hygiene were self-authorized by a ~5-minute burn-in, not by any approved governance artifact. The charter still declares automatic_quarantine_enabled=False and promotion_authority=NONE. Mutation is disabled fail-closed until a founder-approved policy id is present here. Observation continues.
requires_for_enable: burn-in defined by that policy (not a hardcoded 5)
clean cycle must mean overall==CONFIRMED_LIVE, not merely no-mutation
